trust.label: Refresh required
reasons: To clear this: commit 1 uncommitted file(s); consolidate 1 worktree(s) with ./agentic-os clean --apply. A refresh cannot fix sync — do not re-run ./agentic-os morning for this.
1 uncommitted change(s). Commit so nothing is lost between sessions/tools.
1 extra worktree(s) open. Consolidate to main; do not work in worktrees.
hygieneWarnings: Uncommitted files in product repos: RunSmart iOS, Resumely iOS.
Extra product worktrees retained for review: RunSmart iOS (5), Resumely iOS (3).

command.bestNextAction: Resumely iOS: **In date order, and do not collapse them into one read.** (1) **T+1, 2026-07-23:** confirm events arrive carrying `app_version` 1.4.5 — cheapest check that the build reaches real installs. (2) **T+7, 2026-07-29:** monotonicity check, `optimized_preview_rendered` >= `export_success` on a fresh read. This validates the WP-51 instrument and is **not** an activation figure; reporting it as one repeats the error WP-50 corrected. (3) **2026-08-01:** EXD-022 reporting checkpoint — report the clean-activation count honestly, "too early" included; no verdict authority. (4) **T+14, 2026-08-05:** first definitive 1.4.5 cohort read against the >=20 clean-activation gate. Then **WP-48 S2-B** (`is_internal_tester` classifier on Debug/TestFlight builds), the last known measurement defect and the reason 27% of persons still contaminate raw reads, then **WP-56** (file picker, 27 open → 13 select, 48% abandonment with healthy steps either side), deliberately queued behind WP-51 so the gain is countable. Also still open: the deferred Hebrew/RTL PDF gate and triage of stale PRs #100, #96, #86

products.name: RunSmart iOS
products.state: Post-release watch. Nothing to build until the instrument reports
products.nextAction: **Read `has_underlying_error` from the first real `sign_in_failed` on 1.1.2 (target 2026-07-29, T+7).** The verdict is the property value, not the count, and one event decides it. **True** → read `underlying_error_domain`/`_code`, name the precondition (device not signed into iCloud vs Apple ID without 2FA vs genuine app fault), fix with copy plus a precondition check. **False** → a genuinely bare 1000 the device cannot diagnose, which opens **WP-53** (email or guest fallback) on evidence rather than by elimination. **Third possible outcome, name it in advance:** code-1000 volume drops with `has_underlying_error` never going true — that means the iCloud-naming copy was the fix and WP-53 stays closed. Do not read a quiet funnel as "no data". Cheap prior check at T+1 (2026-07-23): confirm events arrive carrying `app_version` 1.1.2, which also re-validates the 1.1.1 fix for analytics losing app version/build after a fresh install

(2) **T+7, 2026-07-29:** monotonicity check, `optimized_preview_rendered` >= `export_success` on a fresh read. This validates the WP-51 instrument and is **not** an activation figure; reporting it as one repeats the error WP-50 corrected. (3) **2026-08-01:** EXD-022 reporting checkpoint — report the clean-activation count honestly, "too early" included; no verdict authority. (4) **T+14, 2026-08-05:** first definitive 1.4.5 cohort read against the >=20 clean-activation gate. Then **WP-48 S2-B** (`is_internal_tester` classifier on Debug/TestFlight builds), the last known measurement defect and the reason 27% of persons still contaminate raw reads, then **WP-56** (file picker, 27 open → 13 select, 48% abandonment with healthy steps either side), deliberately queued behind WP-51 so the gain is countable. Also still open: the deferred Hebrew/RTL PDF gate and triage of stale PRs #100, #96, #86

products.name: RunSmart Web
products.state: Garmin track is maintenance-only per the 2026-07-02 priority-reset decision (Resumely primary). No relaunch work in progress; only breakage fixes
products.nextAction: **Still paused.** Restoring actual sync for the 9 reauth_required users needs either a working production/commercial credential set (WP-26 Steps 3-4) or pointing real users at the Evaluation-tier Internal Test app (the same Terms violation that got the old app deactivated) — there is no maintenance-mode-compatible fix available. This is a fact worth surfacing at the day-30 revisit (~2026-08-01), not a reason to resume now. See Agentic OS WP-26/27/28 for the paused relaunch scope

products.name: ResumeBuilder AI (Web)
products.state: WP-29 Resumely web funnel P0 fixes — S1-S4 completed; S5 anonymous-session carryover is next
products.nextAction: WP-29 S5 — design and implement anonymous session carryover after signup so the first dashboard is not empty

products.name: Agentic OS
products.state: Daily portfolio operations and evidence reconciliation
products.nextAction: Fix the two red eval harnesses — they are the only deterministic quality gates the products have and both have been down for over a week. Start with the RunSmart plan-generator eval (`gh run view --log` on the newest failure; the step fails before writing `report.json`, so check the <configuration value> repo secret first). Then, in the Resumely iOS repo, review and merge `claude/session-ec92e2` and prepare 1.4.4

rows.metric: BOTH APPS LIVE 2026-07-22 (store-verified, Apple lookup API)
rows.resumely: 1.4.5 (15) at 15:23:44Z — first build whose activation number means anything.
rows.runsmart: 1.1.2 (27) at 17:04:47Z — diagnosis build; one property decides WP-53.

rows.metric: Real D7 activation — VOID as a baseline, not a low number
rows.resumely: UNMEASURED. The optimized_preview_rendered milestone was defective from its 1.4.1 form and never fired reliably, so 0%, 12.5% and 10.0% are all artifacts of a broken instrument. Do not compare any post-1.4.5 figure against them.
rows.runsmart: UNMEASURED for a different reason: 0 organic run completions in the App Store era, so there is no denominator to activate against.

rows.metric: Live 30d funnel (2026-07-21) — SUPERSEDED, kept only as the evidence that exposed the defect
rows.resumely: 12 file-selected -> 7 optimized -> 1 preview-rendered -> 3 exported. The impossibility (more exports than previews) is now EXPLAINED and FIXED by WP-51 in 1.4.5. Retained as the diagnostic that found the bug, NOT as a baseline. Next valid read: 2026-07-29 monotonicity check, 2026-08-05 definitive.
rows.runsmart: 3 saw the sign-in wall -> 2 tapped -> 1 in, 1 hard-failed 5x with code 1000. The failures are real; the 'broken for everyone' reading drawn from them is refuted.

rows.resumely: 145 reached → 20 tapped upload → 16 uploaded → 8 job → 2 optimized → 1 exported
rows.runsmart: 23 organic App Store users → 1 onboarded → 1 planned → 0 ran

rows.resumely: arrival → file selected: ~12-15 guests/wk arrive, 0-5 ever select a résumé. The cliff moved earlier than the old upload→optimization framing suggested
rows.runsmart: install → onboarding, and the cause is now named: the sign-in wall is not a persuasion step, it is a broken gate that returns Apple error 1000 to first-time users

rows.metric: Sign-in integrity (EXD-023 REFUTED by its own step 2, 2026-07-22)
rows.resumely: Not applicable — guest path reaches optimization with no account. That architectural difference, not instrumentation quality, is why this funnel is readable.
rows.runsmart: NOT broken for everyone. Revoke-and-retry on public 1.1.1 completed a genuine first-time consent flow: sign_in_completed 10:34:21Z, ZERO sign_in_failed, new auth.identities row 10:34:20Z. Withdrawn: 'has not worked since 2026-06-18'. Still unexplained: 10 code-1000 events on 3 real devices (not 4 — iPhone99,7 is not an Apple model) with 0 completions, and 0 non-founder signups since 2026-06-18. 1.1.2 is live and instrumented; has_underlying_error decides WP-53 on one event.

rows.metric: Audit cross-check (2026-07-21) — why the PostHog AI number is 2.7x optimistic
rows.resumely: A PostHog-generated audit reported 12.8% activation (25/196). It excluded 4 email-matched persons; 54 of 199 persons (27%) carry is_internal_tester and generate 49% of all events. Clean equivalent is ~4.8% (7 optimization_completed / ~145 clean actives). The audit also invented its own activation definition, unaware the WP-50 contract lives in the repo rather than in PostHog
rows.runsmart: Same audit claimed sign_in_failed carries no diagnostics ('error and provider are null') and made fixing it a top-5 weekly priority. It queried property names that do not exist — the real ones (error_code=1000, error_domain, screen=sign_in_wall) are populated on all 12 events. Instrumentation is fine; the Apple config is not

rows.resumely: save_failed 21 events / 20 people, optimization_apply_failed 12/9, optimization_state_recovery_failed 24/12 — ALL with zero diagnostic properties (0 of 57 rows populated). Users who do activate then hit a blind wall
rows.runsmart: plan_generation ~29% failure rate (28 started → 12 succeeded, 8 failed). coach_message_sent silent for 30d while coach_thread_opened still fires — likely silent breakage

rows.resumely: 92% one-and-done (217/234 persons active in exactly one week over 60d); W2 return ~6%. WAU grew 6→63 over 7 weeks then fell to 34 — growth is almost entirely new users, not returning ones
rows.runsmart: D1 10.7% (9/84), D7/D30 not computable — 69 of 84 person IDs are anonymous installs that never authenticated, so the denominator is unusable

rows.resumely: Activation milestone optimized_preview_rendered fires for only 3 people in 60d while more people export than preview — funnel is non-monotonic, so the milestone is suspect
rows.runsmart: app_version/app_build now land correctly on the live build. Note: marketing_version is NOT in this project's taxonomy — plans referencing it should read $app_version / app_build

rows.resumely: 1.4.5 (15) LIVE, released 2026-07-22T15:23:44Z (id6776752349). Carries WP-51 + WP-52 on top of 1.4.4's UI/copy pass.
rows.runsmart: 1.1.2 (27) LIVE, released 2026-07-22T17:04:47Z (id6768297840). Diagnosis build: has_underlying_error, iCloud-naming failure copy, SIWA double-tap guard.

rows.metric: Target (EXD-022, and the first measurable cohort starts NOW)
rows.resumely: >=20 clean activations on a WORKING milestone, no calendar deadline. The 1.4.5 cohort clock started 2026-07-22T15:23:44Z and is the first valid baseline in the product's history. 2026-08-01 = reporting checkpoint, no verdict authority. 2026-09-01 = strategy-revisit trigger.
rows.runsmart: Secondary (EXD-015). No activation target while the front door still fails for an unknown fraction. Gate is the has_underlying_error read, not a rate.

activation.note: REFRESH 2026-07-21 (live PostHog, projects 171597 + 270848). Three things changed and they are not equally good news. (1) RunSmart's new instrumentation works and immediately caught the sign-in P0 reproducing on the LIVE 1.1.1 public binary — this closes the 'is it outage or persuasion' question in favour of outage, and it invalidates reading any RunSmart FTUX number as a product signal until sign-in is fixed. (2) Resumely's canonical WP-50 funnel is readable but n=12/30d and internally inconsistent (more exporters than preview-renderers), so the activation milestone optimized_preview_rendered is itself suspect and must be fixed before the 2026-08-01 EXD-015 target review means anything. (3) Store-verified release truth: RunSmart 1.1.1 live 2026-07-20T20:38:19Z, Resumely still 1.4.3 — though 1.4.4 events are already in PostHog, so a non-App-Store build is circulating. Prior clean-funnel row retained below for continuity. Clean-funnel row added 2026-07-19 from a founder/QA/bot-excluded PostHog read (projects 171597 + 270848, 90d) filed as executive-os/ACTIVATION-AUTOPSY-2026-07-19.md and per-repo docs/plans/2026-07-19-activation-cliff-fix-plan.md. Exclusions: founder person, +fable-qa*/+export-wall* aliases, is_internal_tester (45 persons / 1,216 events in Resumely), burst chains >=3 events/sec, and RunSmart behavioural founder/QA heuristics (>=6 sessions or >=3 app versions). Mature founder-excluded D7 from 2026-07-12 remains the decision contract; the clean-funnel row is diagnostic, not a replacement cohort. Correction: free_ats_completed DOES carry score_bucket — live 90d is 5x '0-40' + 5x '41-60', so every real free-ATS user saw <=60.

funnels.name: Resumely
funnels.tag: iOS · WP-50 contract · 30d through 2026-07-21 · SUPERSEDED BY 1.4.5 — diagnostic only, NOT a baseline

funnels.name: RunSmart
funnels.tag: iOS · sign-in wall, live 1.1.1 (25) only · 2026-07-20 → 07-21 (n=3, outage evidence) · sign-in P0 framing REFUTED 2026-07-22

clocks.what: BOTH APPS LIVE (store-verified): Resumely 1.4.5 (15) at 15:23:44Z, RunSmart 1.1.2 (27) at 17:04:47Z. The EXD-022 activation counter can finally move off zero — the 1.4.5 cohort is the first ever measured on a working milestone.

Sign-in P0 REFUTED by revoke-and-retry on public 1.1.1: genuine first-time consent completed, zero sign_in_failed. EXD-023's regression framing withdrawn and corrected in place. Still unexplained: 3 real devices, 10 code-1000 events, 0 non-founder signups since 06-18.

Agentic OS parser bug found and fixed: keyed_fields skipped bold '**Current Phase:**' blocks, so the dashboard had been reporting RunSmart as '1.0.9 awaiting review' while 1.1.2 was live. 96 tests pass, 2 added.
T+1 reachability check: do non-founder events arrive carrying app_version 1.1.2 and 1.4.5? Binary check, ~10 minutes. Gates every later read.

T+7 double read: RunSmart's first live sign_in_failed with has_underlying_error (decides WP-53 on one event), and Resumely's funnel monotonicity check (optimized_preview_rendered >= export_success). The Resumely one validates the INSTRUMENT, not activation.
EXD-022 mandatory reporting checkpoint. Produces a written progress read with an honest clean-activation count, including 'too early'. NO verdict authority — this is deliberately not a decision date.
T+14 definitive 1.4.5 cohort read against the >=20 clean-activation gate. First trustworthy activation number in the product's history.
EXD-022 separate trigger: if nothing is measurable by here, revisit the activation STRATEGY rather than the metric.

workflows.name: Repo refresh (rebuilds this page)

workflows.name: Weekly CEO review

workflows.name: COO operating review

workflows.how: Logs the weekly growth cycle: what ran, what the numbers did, what to try next. Feeds the Growth tab.
